summary: Align a curriculum map to assessment rubrics and learning objectives using backward design principles.

inputs.name: curriculum_map
inputs.description: The curriculum sequence, units, or lesson plans to align.

inputs.name: learning_objectives
inputs.description: Defined learning goals, standards, or competency targets.

inputs.name: existing_assessments
inputs.description: Current assessments, rubrics, or evaluation tools to check against.

outputs.name: alignment_matrix
outputs.description: Mapping of objectives to curriculum units and assessments.

outputs.name: gap_report
outputs.description: Objectives without assessments or assessments without clear objectives.

outputs.name: revision_recommendations
outputs.description: Suggested changes to close alignment gaps.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is curriculum-assessment alignment, not content creation or grading.
Require both curriculum map and learning objectives before alignment.
Output must include an alignment matrix and explicit gap report.

steps.action: Map each learning objective to the curriculum units that address it.
Check whether each mapped objective has a corresponding assessment or rubric.
List objectives without assessments and assessments without clear objectives.
Propose curriculum or assessment changes to close identified gaps.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read curriculum maps, standards documents, and existing assessments.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Save the alignment matrix and gap report.

verification.method: Check that every objective appears in the alignment matrix.
Check that unmapped objectives and orphan assessments are listed.
Check that revision suggestions are specific enough to implement.

success_criteria: The alignment matrix maps every objective to curriculum and assessment.
Gaps are explicitly listed with severity.
Revision recommendations are specific and actionable for the educator.

rollback.when: If the alignment invents objectives or misrepresents the curriculum, discard and restart from verified inputs.
